review_title: Best AI-based copywriting tool in the market
description: CRAFTLY is currently the most advanced AI writing tool. I've seen a lot of AI-based writing tools, but Craftly is by far the best I've ever used. In about 10 minutes, it can write high-quality content that ranks well on Google. It is especially beneficial to individuals who struggle with writing. You may obtain 10+ generations on any form of writing tool for blogs, product descriptions, ad copy, and more with just one click.
author: Animesh S.
pros: One of the most important tools for developing content to boost an organization's marketing. allows you to write documents and reports utilizing the most advanced artificial intelligence and language technology. This platform has excellent programming that allows you to build projects using natural language. Craftly helps you maintain a consistent writing style across all of your endeavors.
cons: I've been using this application for over two years and have yet to find anything to dislike about it because it meets all of our writing content requirements. But there are a few things I'd like to point out that should be rectified in the near future: first, the free version is only available for a limited time, and second, it's a little expensive for startups.

description: I love Craftly.ai. I use it daily and it's sped up my content creation by 300%.
author: Kelsey T.
pros: Sometimes I get writer's block, and that's where Craftly.ai comes in. Whenever I'm struggling to write a paragraph that reads well, or makes sense, I'll paste it into the "Content Improver" tool and wah lah! I've got a beautifully written paragraph.
cons: I wish there was a tool that generated generic text on a specific prompt. So, if I'm writing my blog, and I need a paragraph about the 5 best Goat breeds, there's no option for me to create this content out of thin air in Craftly. So I default to selecting "Blog Introduction" as my content generator and then manipulating the final text a bit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overthinking, Craftly generate ideas like crazy machine. thanks
author: Doron L.
pros: The only reason I love Craftly.ai is because it save a lot of time of thinking, I think that we will see more and more great AI startup like this in the future, pretty sure Craftly will lead on this area. thank you and have a great day!
cons: It may take a few minutes to understand how it works, but once you understand it - rock and roll.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ariel B.
pros: "I used to dread writing content for my website. I would struggle for hours trying to put together a blog post, and in the end, it never met my expectations. So I was thrilled when Craftly.ai launched and saved me from having to create content for my website. The website is beautiful, the AI is phenomenal, the leadership is strong, and it's simple to use. I also love that they have an easy way to add copy-written content to my website! If you're looking for a simple way to add content to your website, Craftly.ai is the perfect choice!" I'm not a fan of writing reviews about products or creative writing in general... So I had their AI do it for me. Using the "Review" tool on their website, I inputted the product name "Craftly.ai" and then several key words like: -Beautiful website -Phenomenal AI -Strong leadership -Simple to use -Mindblowing copy-written content and clicked "Craft it". Would you have known that the first paragraph in this review was actually written by AI? I doubt it. That's what I love about Craftly.ai, it creates copy for almost anything you need, faster than you ever could, and likely better than you ever could while still sounding authentically human. I now have zero reason to hire a team of copywriters and spend tens of thousands of dollars on pay, benefits, and/or software seats. Shout out to the team behind Craftly.ai, just be careful your advanced AI doesn't take over the world!!!
cons: I am yet to find something wrong with Craftly.ai, as everything has worked amazingly since I started using it and exceeded all my expectations on AI Copywriting.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Carolina S.
pros: This software is life saving! It's so easy to use and truly makes me much more productive and efficient with my time. It certainly helps me when I hit 'writer's block' and need some inspiration. Love it!
cons: Wish it would help writing longer text (multiple paragraphs) and also wish the character limit wasn't so short.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Petar T.
pros: I am amazed by the quality of the text it produces. When I am not in the mood for writing, I can dump random thoughts and it will produce wonderful results. I use many of the results as it produces, I rarely edit.
cons: I wish the sentence rewriter and the content improver could handle more words at once.

review_title: Craftly.AI is in it to win it.
description: Okay, Craftly is seriously rad. I was expecting a lot of limitations like I've seen with Jarvis, Copy.ai and muse. However, Craftly.AI is in it to win it. Quick tip for all users: try ALL the tools, differently... Find your vibe. Do some with longer inputs and some with shorter inputs.
author: Zoya S.
pros: Everything for me comes down to the quality of the outputs, and although they have tons of catching up to do, I would have to go with quality. In the trial I was able to pump out 4 articles in under 2 hours.
cons: Their UI can use some work, I was a bit confused coming onto it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: AI is so popular right now, and I've tried many, this interface is very easy and clean.
author: kassie K.
pros: I love this app - its easy to use and has a wide base of creative outputs.
cons: word count limit- but this is common Too many good options1
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Amnah M.
pros: How quickly it generates ideas and content in the matter of split second.
cons: At times answers are too flowery and robotic and I have to tone it down a bit to add human element
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
